interaction_phrase: showing obvious foresight to the potential of Aliro Technologies
occurrence_sentence: With Samsung Next's Q Fund, Crosslink Ventures and Flybridge Capital Partners showing obvious foresight to the potential of Aliro Technologies, they see the QC industry only getting bigger, and with that, the chance to earn exponentially on their investment.
